race.comment: Hard to knock THE PRIESTESS (6) who has managed three wins and a second from four starts so far this time in work. Has spanked her rivals in her last two appearances, the latest by a whopping 58 metres at Mt Gambier. Meeting a deeper field this time but she looks up to the challenge. CLAUDYS HERO (5) is building in fitness and did a good job when he worked but stuck on for fourth last start at this venue. Peaking now and with better luck he can pose a serious challenge. JUST AS I AM (3) has come from tough barriers to record a win and two seconds in his three starts so far this time. Player again from the good draw. SIX NATIONS (9) was in good form before a ten week break. Two-time fresh winner who hasn't missed a place in five tries at this circuit and distance, winning twice.
